text: TWELFTH: If contractually required, the Subcontractor agrees to provide the Contractor, within ten (10) days from the date of this Subcontract Agreement with Payment and Performance Bonds, each in the penal sum of $10,000,000.00 conditioned for the faithful performance of this contract in all its particulars, duly executed by a surety company authorized to conduct business as a surety on the state where the project is located and acceptable to the Contractor, and in form and manner acceptable to the Contractor. In lieu thereof, the Subcontractor will provide other security acceptable to Contractor and, if the Subcontractor fails to do so, the Contractor may terminate this Agreement without liability or obligation.
